description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and defines a REGISTRY variable set to registry.gitlab.com. Add a single stage named buildpush and a job called buildpush that runs in this stage. In the before_script log in to the Docker registry using docker login -u $CI_BUILD_USER -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN ${REGISTRY}. The job script should execute docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/checkmein2/checkmein2-ui . then docker images --all then docker push registry.gitlab.com/checkmein2/checkmein2-ui. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
